title: No End Flash!
description: Simple mod for delete End Flash (purple lightning in any time)
body:
# No End Flash!

![No-End-Flash!](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/no-end-flash!?label="latest%20mod%20version") ![No-End-Flash!](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/no-end-flash!?label="latest%20game%20version") No-End-Flash is a simple, client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft that disables the purple lightning visual effect, often referred to as the "End flash". ## Usage You can toggle End Flashes using the command `/noendflash`. Available arguments: - Raw command - Help information - status - Current End Flashes status - toggle - Toggle End Flashes (how obvious, isnt it?) ## License This project is licensed under the **CC0 1.0 Universal** license, see the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file for more detailed.
